lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Why did Nebuchadnezzar bring Daniel and his friends to Babylon?
answers: To serve as his wise men

questions.text: What did Daniel want to eat instead of the king’s food, and why?
answers: Vegetables, so he would not disobey God’s laws
Bread, because he was on a diet
Fruit, because he was a picky eater

questions.text: How did Daniel and his friends look after the ten-day test?
Why was Nebuchadnezzar so troubled that he could not sleep?
What did Nebuchadnezzar want his wise men to do?
answers: Tell him his dream and explain it

questions.text: What did the wise men say about the king’s request?
answers: Only a god could tell you what you dreamed

questions.text: What did Daniel tell his friends to do?
answers: Pray that God would reveal the dream
Pray that God would destroy King Nebuchadnezzar

questions.text: How did Daniel learn the king’s dream and its meaning?
answers: God showed him in a vision
An angel came and told him
He read it in a book
A huge statue was smashed by a rock that became a mountain
A river flowed through the king's palace
The sun, moon, and stars bowed down to him
A monster was coming to eat him
Four kingdoms would rise and fall, and God’s kingdom would fill the earth
God wanted Nebuchadnezzar to build a statue
